scripts.assets:world:validate: gltf-transform validate public/models/world/ground.glb && gltf-transform validate public/models/world/central-decor.glb && gltf-transform validate public/models/world/sakura-tree-low.glb && gltf-transform validate public/models/world/sakura-tree-mid.glb && gltf-transform validate public/models/world/sakura-tree-high.glb
scripts.assets:streaming:prepare: npm run assets:world:prepare && npm run assets:fortune:prepare && npm run assets:laboratory:generate && npm run assets:streaming:optimize
scripts.assets:gomoku:validate: gltf-transform validate public/models/gomoku/gomoku_board.glb && gltf-transform validate public/models/gomoku/black_stone.glb && gltf-transform validate public/models/gomoku/white_stone.glb
scripts.assets:laboratory:validate: gltf-transform validate public/models/laboratory/glass_floor.glb && gltf-transform validate public/models/laboratory/dome.glb && gltf-transform validate public/models/laboratory/teleporter.glb
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build && npm run assets:prune
